response.global_analysis: The audio phonetically matches the provided JSON reference for 'Our Time Yellow' and 'Genesis'. I am only subtitling the vocals present in this 5-minute clip, which covers the conclusion of the ReGLOSS performance and the entirety of the 'Genesis' performance by hololive English -Advent-. I've ensured timestamps are tightly wrapped to the vocal audio and handled mid-sentence pauses with logical splits.

subtitles.original: And what if I can make or not?
subtitles.english: And what if I can make or not?

subtitles.original: たとえ 月に見放されても
subtitles.english: Even if I'm forsaken by the moon...

subtitles.original: No worries 私には私が付いてる
subtitles.english: No worries, I've got myself by my side

subtitles.original: 酔いが醒めるまで あと少しだけ
subtitles.english: Until I sober up, just a little longer

subtitles.english: The afterimage capturing truth, so let's win the race

subtitles.english: Beyond the next season, Bloom me, Bloom me

subtitles.english: Please, don't stop this sound
